items.text:
Headshots that read instantly on Spotlight thumbnails.

Shoot in my Grantham studio or at your home - relaxed, guided, and creative.

East Midlands & beyond.

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

DMs welcome

I specialise in expression-led actor headshots, guiding you throughout the shoot to create casting-ready images where your presence feels clear, believable and distinct.

Actors I’ve worked with have later told me things like:

“Already been shortlisted”

and

”I put the headshots out there and got the job.”

items.text:
CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: [estheralli@outlook.com](mailto:estheralli@outlook.com) or [mhmollie0303@icloud.com](mailto:mhmollie0303@icloud.com) 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th March E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true

items.text:
Festival de Artes!! En Pisac! 
Sábado 28 y Domingo 29 !
items.previewTitle:
AYLLU ARTe

ENCUENTRO DE ARTE EN COMUNIDAD

COMMUNITY ART MEETING

5ta edición - MARZO 28 Y 29

El Festival promueve el encuentro de las artes y la cultura para el desarrollo y bienestar social a través de un programa de 2 días de actividades artísticas educativas, un espacio donde podamos visibilizar e impulsar la producción y trabajo de artistas y emprendedores locales  e internacionales, una plataforma que propicia un entorno de colaboración y celebración colectiva.

Música en vivo, DJS, Danza Extática, Sound Healing, Cosmovisión andina, Talleres de arte, Exposiciones, Presentaciones artísticas, Varieté, Feria de productos artesanales, Emprendimientos locales y alimentos, Proyecciones y espacios temáticos.

- 28 DANZA EXTÁTICA de 4.PM A 11.PM 

PROGRAMA:

5.PM OPEN MIC Y FERIA “PISAC PULSE”

6.PM CIRCULO DE CACAO & WARM UP Con Ana Rebolledo.

6.30PM DJ MATT JAH 

8.30 DJS AYMA B2B INSPIRAL

10.30PM SOUND HEALING

Sachi Djembe - Dieltrene Saxon - Estrella Voz -Leonathan Vientos - Ailinsinha Voz

- Domingo 29 VARIETE de 6.PM a 8.PM 

ARTISTAS: Eric Otero Clown - Toño Marache Equilibrio - Mahkenzi full circle Delia Multihoop - Mila Fire dragon - Alain Trapecio - Prcyrcus Rueda cyr - Amayu Danza - Jota Malabar Monociclo. MÚSICOS: Nitai - Dieltrene - Inti - El Chuy

Ven y participa de los talleres, deleita tu paladar con productos locales, disfruta en familia, sorprendete con grandes artistas, trae tú mejor intención para la conciencia colectiva, vibra a través de las ondas sonoras, conecta con el arte, vive una experiencia de integración Holística y bienestar social. 

Entrada General S/100 x 2 Días Pre venta en Solseed y Shambhala.

DANZA EXTÁTICA S/70 - Pre venta S/50

VARIETE - PUKLLAY S/30 - Pre venta S/20 Niños y Niñas ingreso libre.

Venta  en Solseed y Shambhala al +51967098711

Gracias a las Alianzas y Colaboradores:

Solseed - Shambhala- LAB Studio - Wasi LAB - Pisac Pulse.

Organiza: PERRO VOLADOR

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium**

The New Symposium invites applications from artists and practitioners working across music and related artistic disciplines —

Participants form an **interdisciplinary working group** and** develop their practice in dialogue with an international community **and **participate at the 6th edition of the Bled Contemporary Music Week!**

As an ongoing international forum and residency program, it creates a space for artistic development through weekly online exchange, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning — more about the program: [https://thenewsymposium.com/description/](https://thenewsymposium.com/description/)

Apply **before March 31**, to join the program in April and festival in June —

[https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/](https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/)

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text:
Hi, wir suchen als kleine No Budget Produktion 8 Komparsen die Lust haben uns bei einem Teaserdreh nächste Woche am 28.03 in Berlin von 8:30 bis ca. 17:00 zu unterstützen.

Der Teaser wird gedreht, um damit Finanzierungen für die spätere Spielfilmproduktion zu akquirieren.

Es wird ein Rom Com Drama & geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. 

Schreibt mir gerne eine DM bei Interesse mit Foto.

Wir würden uns sehr freuen, wenn wir 8 Menschen zusammenkriegen. Gerne so divers wie möglich.

attachments.ocrText: May be a doodle of text that says 'HELP Wir drehen einen Film! Und suchen 8-10 Menschen, die Lust haben, im Hintergrund dabei zu sein und uns damit bei unserem Teaserdreh zu unterstützen. Der Teaser hilft uns dabei, die Finanzierung zu sichern und einen ersten Eindruck vom Look & Feel des Films zu zeigen. Es geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. Wenn alles gut läuft, würden wir euch super gerne a auch später im bezahlten Projekt berücksichtigen Berlin (Gerdan's Café) 28.03. ab 8：30 ROSUGATN Essen, gute Stimmung & tolle Leute inklusive Schreib mir, wenn du Zeit & Lust hast und zu unterstützen'

Casting call
Project title: Glideshare short film 

Run time 30 minutes 

Written by: Augy Johnston 

Producer/director: Tyler Schacht 

Genre: Horror 

Production company: Superstar TV Entertainment 

Location: Morrison Colorado, Littleton Colorado and brush Colorado

Dates: April 24-26

Non-unions and unions are welcome to submit 

Paid project 

Synopsis 

A creepy ride share driver who picks up two passengers teddy and Patricia who are dating, Patricia doesn't want to get in the ride share but her boyfriend insists it's ok and everything will be fine. When they get in they realize the driver is driving them to an unknown location that they didn't put as their destination. Ride share driver turns out to be a high profile murderer and kidnapper. Patricia escapes but her boyfriend gets killed by the driver.

Character

Patricia 

Teddy's girlfriend, who was sexually assaulted in her past and has a lot of flashbacks and has emotional breakdowns. 5 foot 5 inches in height Long black hair, Latina. Slim.

To submit, email Tyler Schacht at tylerschacht8@gmail.com with resume and demo reel if available

items.text:
## **Casting Call: PinsXP Brand Launch Suite**

**Title:** PinsXP “Experience Provider” Campaign

**Genre:** Commercial / Lifestyle

**Logline:** A series of short-form ads showcasing the "PinsXP" social app as it unlocks exclusive dining and community experiences across the Denver-Metro area.

**Roles:**
**[THE DATE NIGHT COUPLE]:** 2 Actors (Ideally a real-life couple). Age: 30s. Appearance: Elevated casual. Role involves an intimate, sophisticated dinner date.

**[THE SOCIAL GROUP]:** 4 Actors (Mixed group or 2 couples). Age: Late 20s to early 30s. Appearance: Trendy, approachable, high energy. Role involves a lively "neighborhood gathering" at a local taproom.

**[TUTORIAL LEAD / HAND TALENT]:** 1 Actor (Any gender). Must be a good presenter and have clean, well-groomed hands. Role involves a mix of "talking head" style tutorials and close-up phone interactions with the PinsXP app.

**Production Company:** Prism Creatives 

**Production Type:** Digital Commercial / Social Media Suite

**Contact Information:** PLEASE SEND A MESSAGE OR EMAIL FIRST TO RECEIVE SIDES AND INSTRUCTIONS. Emails can be sent to prismcreativesllc@gmail.com with "PinsXP Audition" in the subject line. You can also send me a message here on Facebook.

**Run Time:** Approx 60 seconds per video

**Compensation:** Paid (Flat fee per session) + High-end meal/drinks provided during the shoot.

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Audition Information (Online Only):** Send a message or an email to receive sides and audition instructions by **Saturday, March 21st**. Emails can be sent to prismcreativesllc@gmail.com

**Shooting Schedule:** 
**Tuesday, March 24:** 6hr shoot for the Date Night and Social Group roles at two locations in Arvada.
**Tutorial Shoot:** Date TBD (Approx. 3 hours).

**Filming Location:** Two restaurants in the Arvada Area 

**Project Description:** This campaign follows the "PinsXP" user experience from discovery to payoff. We are looking for actors who can deliver natural, conversational dialogue while interacting with the app's interface (Map, Wallet, and Community features). While we have a script for these videos, we're encouraging talent to improvise and capture authentic moments of laughter and connection. Real-life couples and established friend groups are highly encouraged to apply together.

items.text:
Remembering Nikolay Kolyada — The Sun of Russian Drama 🎭

What does it take to keep a theatre alive—not for a season, but for over 20 years?

In this lecture, I speak about my time in Yekaterinburg, watching my first Russian play, and then unexpectedly sitting down with Nikolay Kolyada.

There’s a section in the video where I include part of that interview. In it, Kolyada speaks about how his theatre actually runs — the actors, the performances, the reality of sustaining it without state funding.

Our conversation went on for much longer. We spoke about directing, the audience, how actors work, and the difference between Western theatre and Russian theatre — whether you start from the head, or from the heart.

What stayed with me is how everything in that theatre is driven by necessity.
They have to keep working. Keep performing. Keep the theatre alive.

That’s what this lecture is really about — not just who he was, but how that kind of work is built, and sustained over time.

Watch the full lecture here:
https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE?si=BiAU5qoWsboXEGZR

sharedPost.text:
Remembering one of contemporary Russian theatre’s most prolific—and relentless—figures, Nikolay Kolyada 🎭

Often called “The Sun of Russian Drama,” Kolyada was a playwright, director, teacher, and founder of his own independent theatre—built not on state support, but on sheer necessity, discipline, and an unbreakable commitment to the work. He wrote over 150 plays, trained a generation of playwrights, and created a living, breathing theatre that performed up to 70 times a month.

His philosophy was simple, but unforgiving: captivate the artist, and pay them. Keep the work moving. Keep the theatre alive.

He didn’t just make theatre—he built a system where theatre could survive.

Wishing you a moment today to remember the artists who dedicate their lives entirely to the craft.

#kolyada #russiantheatre #acting #vlytartacting

items.text:
Remembering Nikolay Kolyada — The Sun of Russian Drama 🎭

What does it take to keep a theatre alive—not for a season, but for over 20 years?

In this lecture, we explore the life and work of Nikolay Kolyada: playwright, director, teacher, and founder of one of Russia’s most unique independent theatres. A theatre built without state funding. A theatre that survived through discipline, output, and an uncompromising commitment to the craft.

Kolyada’s system was simple:
Keep working. Keep creating. Keep performing.

With up to 60–70 performances a month, a long-standing ensemble of actors, and over 150 plays written, his theatre was not sustained by prestige—but by necessity.

This lecture is not just about history. It is about understanding:
– what makes a performance truly alive
– the difference between thinking and experiencing on stage
– and what it means to dedicate your life to the work

Watch the full lecture here: https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE

#vlytartacting #kolyada #acting #russiantheatre

ACTING WORKSHOPS IN RUNCORN! 🎬
If you are interested in learning more about character development, to improve on improvisation, and gain valuable tools towards your acting skill set, then comment here.
I will be reviewing the amount of interest to establish a structured set of classes and single day workshops for actors local to the North West areas.
These classes will incorporate my 12 dramatic show reel scenes book, practicing character building and improvisation from the actors, to perform believable characters and deliver convincing performances. 
Any level of acting skill welcome! 18+ ages
#acting #actor #actingworkshop #northwest #characterisation #improvisation #drama

TEATRO da TERRA

POTNIA THERON de Hélia Correia 

DIA MUNDIAL DO TEATRO

27 MARÇO
Sexta- feira às 21h30

CINE-TEATRO SÃO JOÃO, PALMELA

info e reservas
Bilheteira do Cine-Teatro São João e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/.../173353-potnia_theron-cine_teatro.../

teatrodaterra.com
facebook.com/teatrodaterra

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um fôlego, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES
cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS
assistência de encenação BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO
assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO da TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

I'm on video messaging service cameo and I do birthday greetings, motivational, funny stuff, supportive, silly or heartfelt videos depending on demand. I get a few a month for characters I've played in Vikings and Deathrace amongst others.
If you too work in the film industry and work like to join me in entertaining fans then please click the invitation link below and start recording you own videos for your fans. They are an established company and have never let me down. The app is very simple to use and the payment system is linked to your bank and pays out within 2-3 days without fail. Good luck and hope to see some of my fellow entertainers on the site. It's global so works from anywhere !
It doesn't matter what type of entertainer you are. The site has actors, musicians, voice actors, comedians, sportsman and other celebrity types. 
Good luck !

items.text:
CASTING CALL - ‘NO FUTURE’ A STUDENT FICTIONAL SHORT FILM
MA Filmmaking Student - 10-15mins.

Shooting 25-26th April and 2-3rd May in Derby, Tutbury and Burton on Trent.

Unpaid but Travel, Catering and Footage provided.

We’re seeking talent from Nottingham, Derby, Burton On Trent and surrounding areas for our upcoming fictional short film; ‘No Future’. Below is a brief outline of the narrative:

SYNOPSIS:

Acknowledging the high rates of unemployment amongst young adults in contemporary Britain, ‘No Future’ (working title) tells the story of a young graduate navigating working life once moving back home to his blue-collar town after university. The film follows the struggles he faces reintegrating with an environment he feels he's outgrown.

Employing traits of British Social Realism, this story serves to highlight the mental and external battles hundreds of thousands of young adults up and down the country grapple with daily.

AVAILABLE ROLES:

Lead - Sam Merkel, Male, 20-25.

Supporting - John Merkel, Male, 35-60.

Day Players - Charlie and Will, Male, 20-28.

Extras - Factory Workers, Male, 20-28.

If interested, please shoot me an email at jacklwright20@gmail.com or alternatively here on Facebook and I can provide more details, as well as a link to the Backstage Casting Call if preferred. Thank you!

items.text:
Casting call-student short film
We are the filmmaking second year student from University of Huddersfield, The film is a psychological thriller, £15 one days, totally will be £45, including travel fees and catering 

logline:

After fleeing a police raid and vanishing into a forest, a fugitive's night of survival becomes a quiet unravelling of reality, as hunger, fear and fractured memory begin to surface.

It follows Tom Calder, a man in his mid to late 20s, over one night as he is being chased and hiding in woods.

Tom is quiet and keeps to himself. He doesn’t speak much and tries to stay in control, but as the night goes on, he becomes more unstable and unpredictable.

For casting, we need someone who can show emotion through body language and facial expressions, as there is very little to no dialogue.

If you have any concerns feel free to chat with me

Rusza pozytywny , kolorowy casting do nowej reklamy

popularnej sieci sklepów– a MY szukamy wyjątkowych dzieciaków! 💛

👧👦 KOGO SZUKAMY?

dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat

dziewczynki i chłopcy

wszystkie typy urody i sylwetki

dzieci o różnym pochodzeniu etnicznym

Szczególnie mile widziane są także dzieci:

z lekką nadwagą

z aparatem na zębach

z odstającymi uszami

o nietypowej, charakterystycznej urodzie

❤️Najważniejsze: osobowość, naturalność i charakter!❤️

Poniżej znajdziecie najważniejsze informacje ⚠️

Recall odbywa się wyłącznie na żywo – obecność obowiązkowa ❗ Lokalizacja: WARSZAWA

Nie ma możliwości recallu online ❗

Brak karty aktorskiej – nie jest wymagana❗

📅 TERMINY

30.03 (do godz. 8:00) – deadline na przesłanie zgłoszeń

03.04 – recall (na żywo)

09.04 – przymiarki

10.04 – dzień zdjęciowy

🎥 MATERIAŁY CASTINGOWE

Prosimy o nagranie:

1. Wizytówki

Krótko opowiedz coś o sobie 😊

2. Scenki naturalnej aktywności przy biurku, np.: rysowanie , układanie LEGO, puzzle, memory 🍀

👉 Ważne:

🤩 nagranie blisko (półzbliżenie) – tak, aby dobrze było widać twarz PLUS standardowo naturalność i swoboda – bez aktorstwa „na siłę”, dajmy dzieciom się pokazać w ich naturalnym wyczuciu ! 🍓☺️👌

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 💌

Zapraszamy do aplikowania:

MAILOWO 👉 casting@unagimedia.pl / tytuł: 009

Pamiętajcie, że każde zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: imię, nazwisko, wiek, miejscowość, doświadczenie, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki (wyraźne, bez okularów, nakryć głowy, na jednolitym tle), wizytówkę dziecka, scenkę, wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania oraz obuwia (fajnie gdybyście umieścili również wymiary szczegółowe czyli: klatka piersiowa, pas, biodra)⭐️

To świetna okazja na pierwszą (lub kolejną!) przygodę przed kamerą ✨

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami,

P O W O D Z E N I A !❤️

dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat

dziewczynki i chłopcy

COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – INDIE NO-BUDGET FILM** 🎬

Hi everyone! I’m looking to cast a **female actor** for a small but important role in an indie short film.

🎭 **Role:** Day Care Teacher
* Female
* Age: 30–40
* Warm, natural, and expressive presence

📍 **Location:** Surrey
📅 **Date:** 4th April
⏱️ **Duration:** Approx. 2 hours shoot

🎥 **Details:**
* Volunteer / non-paid position
* Light, manageable shoot with a small crew

✨ **What you’ll get:**
* IMDb credit
* Crafty (food & refreshments on set)
* Opportunity to be part of a passion-driven indie project

items.text:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: OFF MIRROR Studio

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿: V. Chase Malukha

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗘:

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗 – Male, 25-40

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻:

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 / 𝗚𝗮𝘇𝗲: We are looking for depth and intelligence. The actor must be able to "hold the frame in silence," allowing the audience to read his internal monologue.

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼-𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: The ability to convey quiet panic, disorientation, and intense internal struggle without overacting.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

𝗩𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁:

Urban noir aesthetic. Isolation in a crowd, the cold light of a metropolis, the intimacy of an epiphany. This is highly internalized acting (working "under the skin").

𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 & 𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗙-𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦:

Please submit your Headshot, Resume/Profile link, and Self-Tape to: maryna@offmirror.studio

𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗲: THE MILLENNIAL - your name

• 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗧𝗮𝗽𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Prepare a silent scene (up to 2 minutes). Theatricality and overacting are strictly discouraged.

• 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲: March 25, 11:59 PM. (We are casting on a tight turnaround).

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

items.text:
Title: Lamotrigine 

Genre: Drama 

Logline: A woman’s day is derailed after retrieving an old jacket from her ex. 

Roles: 

Sophie (F, mid 20s): Madi’s good friend who is now married and living in the suburbs. 

Luna (F, early-mid 20s-30s): Trans woman. An old classmate of Madi’s who reconnects with her at a train station. 

Dream Woman: (F, 20s-30s): A tall figure who appears in Madi’s dream. 

Director: Ryleigh Dorman

Producer: Frances McIlvain

Indie, micro-budget, nonunion 

Compensation: Flat fee, negotiable 

Shooting Schedule: Looking at a handful of dates across April-June of 2026. 

Location: In & around the Denver-Boulder area 

Audition Information: email mcilvainbiz@gmail.com with headshot and reel or relevant reference material.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: DEAR OLIVIA
(NON-Union)
We are casting supporting roles for our upcoming psychological thriller short film “Dear Olivia.”

This is an independent passion project and the first production our team is creating, so all roles are currently unpaid. However, we plan to continue making projects and actors involved may have opportunities for future paid roles in upcoming productions.

We’re looking for passionate actors who want to collaborate, build their reel, and be part of something creative.

ROLES
LIAM

Male | Mid 20s – Early 30s

Liam appears at first to be friendly, charming, and dependable — the kind of neighbor everyone trusts. He’s physically fit, confident, and has an easygoing personality that puts people at ease.

However, beneath the surface there is something off and unsettling. Liam hides a darker side that slowly reveals itself as the story progresses.

Character traits

Charismatic and approachable

Physically fit / athletic presence

Calm and controlled demeanor

Capable of shifting from warm and friendly to deeply unsettling

This role requires an actor comfortable portraying subtle psychological tension and a darker transformation.

===================================================
TITA RITA (Filipino preffered / Asian)

Female | 40s – 60s

Tita Rita is Olivia’s loud, loving, and slightly nosy aunt-like neighbor. She’s energetic, opinionated, and always trying to play matchmaker.

She brings light comedic energy to the story — teasing Olivia about relationships, gossiping, and trying to set her up with potential suitors.

Character traits

Warm and outgoing personality

Playful and talkative

Slightly dramatic and humorous

Gives strong “fun aunt” energy

This role adds warmth and humor before the story takes a darker turn.

===================================================
GRANDPA ROGER

Male | 65+

Grandpa Roger is a sweet elderly man who has known Olivia for years. He’s kind, gentle, and affectionate toward her.

He is preparing to move into a care home, which is why Liam is helping him.

Character traits

Kind and grandfatherly

Soft-spoken and warm

Gentle presence

He has poor eyesight, and slightly forgetful

This is a small but meaningful role that adds emotional warmth to the story.

***** please email us your Photo and Bio *****
please send us a photo of you (Mug shot)
===tmbyn.studios@gmail.com===
please caption "Dear Olivia Audition"
- Auditioning Role:
- Age:
- Gender:
- Height:
- Complexion
- Tell me something interesting about yourself!
- Availability (Days)

Auditiona Date April 4th, 2026
Audition Place TBA.

This is an independent passion project and the first production our team is creating, so all roles are currently unpaid. However, we plan to continue making projects and actors involved may have opportunities for future paid roles in upcoming productions.

We’re looking for passionate actors who want to collaborate, build their reel, and be part of something creative.

ROLES
LIAM

Male | Mid 20s – Early 30s

Liam appears at first to be friendly, charming, and dependable — the kind of neighbor everyone trusts. He’s physically fit, confident, and has an easygoing personality that puts people at ease.

However, beneath the surface there is something off and unsettling. Liam hides a darker side that slowly reveals itself as the story progresses.

Character traits

Charismatic and approachable

Physically fit / athletic presence

Calm and controlled demeanor

Capable of shifting from warm and friendly to deeply unsettling

This role requires an actor comfortable portraying subtle psychological tension and a darker transformation.

===================================================
TITA RITA (Filipino preffered / Asian)

Female | 40s – 60s

Tita Rita is Olivia’s loud, loving, and slightly nosy aunt-like neighbor. She’s energetic, opinionated, and always trying to play matchmaker.

She brings light comedic energy to the story — teasing Olivia about relationships, gossiping, and trying to set her up with potential suitors.

Character traits

Warm and outgoing personality

Playful and talkative

Slightly dramatic and humorous

Gives strong “fun aunt” energy

This role adds warmth and humor before the story takes a darker turn.

===================================================
GRANDPA ROGER

Male | 65+

Grandpa Roger is a sweet elderly man who has known Olivia for years. He’s kind, gentle, and affectionate toward her.

He is preparing to move into a care home, which is why Liam is helping him.

Character traits

Kind and grandfatherly

Soft-spoken and warm

Gentle presence

He has poor eyesight, and slightly forgetful

This is a small but meaningful role that adds emotional warmth to the story.

***** please email us your Photo and Bio *****
please send us a photo of you (Mug shot)
===tmbyn.studios@gmail.com===

items.text:
Hi, all.
My names Safiya I’m a third year student studying journalism but I also do acting. For my course I’m doing a short form podcast titled the “reality of pursuing acting”.

This would be questions related conversations on what it’s like to pursue acting from different perspectives.
 
Im looking to speak to:
1.) A actor who has or is in acting/drama school
2.)A actor who hasn’t been to acting school but is pursuing acting 
3.) A drama, acting or theatre coach/teacher 
4.) Casting director

Anyone can get in touch via facebook messenger or my email Safiya.warrior@hotmail.co.uk

I can send you more details on what this entails but that is the general bases.

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
💃 MODEL CASTING CALL 🏎️
​Regals & Runways is looking for models to pair with the most iconic rides in Rochester for the ULTIMATE Car & Fashion Experience, Sunday, August 16th, 2026! This event is the perfect fusion of classic soul, high-octane gears, and retro fashion...fun for the whole family! 

​📍 CASTING CALL DETAILS:
​DATE: Sunday, April 12th, 2026
​TIME: 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
​LOCATION: 52 Rochester Public Market, Rochester, NY
HOW TO DRESS: All black attire, heels, & photo ready hair/makeup

​🏁 WHO WE NEED:
​ALL shapes, sizes, ages, and backgrounds. All men, women, and children are welcome—no experience required, just bring your good vibes and strut your stuff! 

🗣️ NOTE: Anyone UNDER 18 years of age will require parent/guardian consent to participate. Parents/Guardians must be present for casting, shoot(s), and/or show if casted. 

👀 ALL Models selected will be invited to a FREE Makeup Class hosted by THE Aud Makeup Artist (yours truly 💁‍♀️) 
*Details to be released at a later time. 

Who's ready to join the movement? Drop a 🔥 if we'll see you there! 

📸: @hoytephoto
Designs & Concept: @xstravagance_designs
#MakeupByAud

items.text: Come and audition with us for one of these two fantastic shows!

sharedPost.text:
Come and audition with us for one of these two fantastic shows!

We’re beyond excited to be among the very first amateur dramatic producers bringing the West End smash hit 2:22 A Ghost Story by Danny Robins to the stage! Coming to @artrix_bromsgrove this September.

Then in October we’ll be performing the incredible Hitchcock Blonde @palacetheatreredditch 

Want to be part of one of these shows? Auditions are open!
 Drop us an email at halftailproductionsuk@gmail.com and we’ll send over an audition pack

#222aghoststory #hitchcockblonde #bromsgrove #localtheatre #redditch

items.title: China. Zhengzhou.

items.text:
‼️MĘŻCZYŹNI - STAND IN - WARSZAWA‼️
💶Stawka: 600zl /dzień
📣🎬Na plan, jako osoby zastępujące aktorów do ustawiania oświetlenia, kamer itp, poszukuję 4 Mężczyzn zgodnie z poniższymi informacjami. 
‼️
Wybrani Panowie zostaną poproszeni o nauczenie się krótkiego tekstu w obcym języku (spokojnie, nie trzeba martwić się o akcenty, wymowę itp byle powiedzieć choćby fonetycznie). 

📣PAN 1 - dostępność w dniach 7,8,9.04 - tekst w języku niemieckim
* wiek 25-45lat, włosy w kolorze blond/ciemny blond - bez wygoleń, ale i bez długich włosów , bez zarostu
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: ok 168cm wzrostu, kołnierzyk 41 cm, obwody klatka/pas/biodra: 98/88/99, but 38-40

📣PAN 2 - dostępność w dniach 10,11.04 - tekst w języku francuskim
* wiek 40-60lat; łysy, z siwiejącą brodą, dobrze zbudowany (bardziej mięśnie niż tłuszczyk)
* wzrost ok 168cm, rozmiar M-L 

📣PAN 3 - dostępność w dniach 12,13,14.04 - tekst w języku włoskim 
* wiek 30-50lat, typ Hiszpana/Włocha - ciemne włosy (nieco dłuższe, nie wygolone), ciemna broda, ciemna oprawa oczu
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: wzrost 186cm, rozmiar koszuli XL, pas ok 103cm, but 44

📣PAN 4 - dostępność w dniach 15,16,17.04 - tekst w języku hiszpańskim 
* wiek ok 35-55lat, włosy ciemny blond, siwiejące boki i zarost (taki trzydniowy)
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: wzrost 172cm, koszulka XL, spodnie EU 54/56, pas ok 108cm, but 42 

💥
Wskazane daty dostępności poszczególnych Panów są obowiązkowe, nie ma możliwości by być np tylko raz. 
📬📬📬
Jesli któryś z Panów pasuje opisem i wymiarami do Ciebie zgłoś się na mój mail: 
Justyna.lapka@atlantafilms.pl 
W tytule maila: STANDin 
W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr tel, miejscowość, aktualne wymiary: 
- wzrost
- obwody w centymetrach klatka/pas/biodra 
- numer buta 
- rozmiar kołnierzyka 
- rozmiar koszuli

💶Stawka: 600zl /dzień
📣🎬Na plan, jako osoby zastępujące aktorów do ustawiania oświetlenia, kamer itp, poszukuję 4 Mężczyzn zgodnie z poniższymi informacjami. 
‼️
Wybrani Panowie zostaną poproszeni o nauczenie się krótkiego tekstu w obcym języku (spokojnie, nie trzeba martwić się o akcenty, wymowę itp byle powiedzieć choćby fonetycznie). 

📣PAN 1 - dostępność w dniach 7,8,9.04 - tekst w języku niemieckim
* wiek 25-45lat, włosy w kolorze blond/ciemny blond - bez wygoleń, ale i bez długich włosów , bez zarostu
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: ok 168cm wzrostu, kołnierzyk 41 cm, obwody klatka/pas/biodra: 98/88/99, but 38-40

📣PAN 2 - dostępność w dniach 10,11.04 - tekst w języku francuskim
* wiek 40-60lat; łysy, z siwiejącą brodą, dobrze zbudowany (bardziej mięśnie niż tłuszczyk)
* wzrost ok 168cm, rozmiar M-L 

📣PAN 3 - dostępność w dniach 12,13,14.04 - tekst w języku włoskim 
* wiek 30-50lat, typ Hiszpana/Włocha - ciemne włosy (nieco dłuższe, nie wygolone), ciemna broda, ciemna oprawa oczu
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: wzrost 186cm, rozmiar koszuli XL, pas ok 103cm, but 44

📣PAN 4 - dostępność w dniach 15,16,17.04 - tekst w języku hiszpańskim 
* wiek ok 35-55lat, włosy ciemny blond, siwiejące boki i zarost (taki trzydniowy)
* o wymiarach jak najbardziej zbliżonych: wzrost 172cm, koszulka XL, spodnie EU 54/56, pas ok 108cm, but 42

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hi everyone! 

We're casting for the short film 'The Way of the Lamb', shooting end of April/Early May around Copenhagen.It’s a period piece set in 1920s Denmark. 

The film follows a boy’s spiritual discovery and explores life after death.

You can read more about the project here: https://filmdaily.co/indie-film/film-festivals/way-of-the-lamb-daniel-knights-spiritual-coming-of-age-wins-first-franzi-shorts-competition/

**We're looking for 5 roles:**

-8-10 year-old boy (Protagonist) 

-10-13 year-old female (Sister) 

-35-50 year-old male (Dad) 

-+50 year-old female (Grandma) 

+50 year-old male (Priest) 

The film will be spoken in Danish, so no English fluency is required, but advised, as we're working with an international crew. 

We will be holding auditions for these roles, so please email us on **wayofthelamb@franzifilms.com** if you're interested or know someone who might be :)

Unfortunately, as it's a short film (and it's very tough to get a budget for these projects), nobody is getting a salary. We're looking for someone who's mostly looking to have fun and go on this ride with us for the love of it, get good material for their reel, and go to festivals. 

I'm directing, Zoe Stiletano is producing, Daniel Knight is the writer, and Nick Gray is the DP. It's produced by www.franzifilms.com 

Looking forward to getting you on the team! 🙌

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: “MY AIM IS TRUE”**
**(Vancouver, BC | NON-UNION)**

Indie film (10–15 minutes) seeking strong actors for two roles. Dramatic, literary, and dialogue-driven (inspired by a classic play).

**ROLES:**

**STEVE MATTICE (Male, 55–70) — LEAD**
A confident, gregarious, and happily married politician, who aspires to be party leader. He receives unsettling news that may damage his reputation.** Substantial role across full shoot.**

**SORAYA BAHAR (Female, 55–70) --SUPPORTING**

A veteran CBC journalist and Abigail Mattice’s (Steve’s wife’s) best friend and confidante. Her life is turned upside down by a revelation from her distant past.
**Smaller, dialogue-heavy role (approx. one scene / shorter shoot time).**

**SHOOT DETAILS:**
📍 East Vancouver, BC
🗓 1–2 shoot days (week of April 20) + 1 rehearsal

**PAY:**
💰 Steve Mattice: $200 stipend + meals
💰 Soraya Bahar: $100 stipend + meals

**PERKS:**
🎥 Festival submissions
🎬 Professional-quality reel footage
🤝 Focused, collaborative set

**TO APPLY:**
Please send by April 3rd:
• Headshot
• Short bio or résumé
• Reel/clips (if available, not required)

To  Kegan Doyle: [Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca](mailto:Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca)

Contact me if you have questions.

**This is a great opportunity for experienced actors who enjoy doing character-driven work.**

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

Who applied for other characters can submit their audition by 25th March. 

**Casting:**

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume

items.summary:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

Who applied for other characters can submit their audition by 25th March. 

**Casting:**

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Florian Müller darüber, dass Medienarbeit Beziehungsarbeit vorausgeht. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #schauspiel #acting #casting

items.text:
Headshots that read instantly on Spotlight thumbnails.

Shoot in my Grantham studio or at your home - relaxed, guided, and creative.

East Midlands & beyond.

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

DMs welcome

I specialise in expression-led actor headshots, guiding you throughout the shoot to create casting-ready images where your presence feels clear, believable and distinct.

Actors I’ve worked with have later told me things like:

“Already been shortlisted”

and

”I put the headshots out there and got the job.”

🚨 URGENT! LOOKING FOR ACTOR / ANIMATOR / DANCER
📅 April 1–2 | Warsaw

We urgently need a replacement for the main actor for an immersive show.

Lines will be in English (not many) and are already prepared — you just need to perform them on stage with music.

💪 Athletic build preferred

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called "Just Go - -The Day I left
Kevin Costner "

I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 

I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.

You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.

Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 

Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 

I'm excited to hear from you. 

Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :

A project: 
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40706407/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_1_tt_8_nm_0_in_0_q_just%20go%20the%20day

sharedPost.text:
En manitas trabajando -ahora en el mes de marzo con el 40% de descuento en inscripción- buscamos formar un ambiente sano y armónico para que los pequeños se sientan seguros dentro de nuestras instalaciones, en conjunto con nuestro equipo, ya que sabemos que es muy importante la relación entre ambiente laboral y estudiantil cuando se habla del ámbito escolar. 🌈⭐️

Ubicados en 📍privada Oaxaca #422 colonia el Carmen 
Contáctanos 📱2221885314

Китай,  Шань Чанбаи, провинция Цзилинь  в парке, работа в ресторане.
2 девушки танцора рост 160+, зарплата 8000 юаней.
Баянист 1 парень , 9000 юаней.
4 месяца с мая до октября.

Рабочий график:с 14:30 до 17:30, с 18:30 до 22:00 
Компания предоставляет: трех разовое питание, проживание в гостинице по 2 человека в комнате, билеты в обе стороны, официальное трудоустройство.

items.text:
**OPEN CASTING CALL**
**キャスティング募集のお知らせ**

**SEEKING JAPANESE SPEAKING, JAPANESE PEOPLE**
**日本語が話せる、日本人の方を募集しています**

Casting Directors, Colleen Bolton and Maureen Webb are 
**seeking Japanese speaking people for MAJOR TV SERIES**.
No Acting Experience Necessary! Shooting in the Vancouver area.

キャスティングディレクターのコリーン・ボルトンおよびモーリーン・ウェッブは、**大手テレビシリーズに出演する日本語が話せる**
**日本人の方を募集しています。**演技経験は不要です！
撮影はバンクーバー近郊で行われます。

**Requirements:**
* Japanese-Canadians or Japanese born people 
* Must be a native and fluent Japanese speaker without an English accent 
* Open gender
* 18 – 70 years of age
* Paid opportunity (per UBCP)
* No acting experience required
* Must be based in Vancouver, BC (or the Lower Mainland)
* Must be a Canadian citizen, permanent resident, or have valid work permit

**応募条件：**
* 日系カナダ人、または日本生まれの方
* 英語訛りのない、ネイティブレベルで日本語が堪能な方
* 性別は問いません
* 18歳～70歳
* 報酬あり（UBCP規定に基づく）
* 演技経験は問いません（未経験OK）
* バンクーバーBC州（またはローワーメインランド）在住の方
* カナダ市民、永住権保持者、または有効なワーキングビザをお持ちの方

Performers with agents or performers who have auditioned for Colleen Bolton or Maureen Webb in the last 3 months NEED NOT APPLY. 
エージェントに所属している方、または過去3ヶ月以内にコリーン・ボルトンまたはモーリーン・ウェッブのオーディションを受けた方はご応募いただけません。

**If interested please submit your information to this Google Form:**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

**ご興味のある方は、以下のGoogleフォームよりご応募ください：**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

If you have any questions please email Casting Assistant, June Fukumura at [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com) 

ご質問がある場合は、キャスティングアシスタントの福村じゅんまでメールでお問い合わせください [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com)

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

topComments.text: Wir haben es über WhatsApp gemacht. Jeder hat es und funktioniert am besten. Erstell einfach ne Gruppe.
Ja, eine WhatsApp-Gruppe hat sich gut bewährt.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 13/2026

B MOVIE ACTION?,  EINE HORRORKÖMÖDIE UND DIE THEATERGRUPPE ZELLERNDORF IM TALK

Erinnerungen an die 80er Jahre werden wach, wenn Jason Statham sich zumindest einmal im Jahr durch einen Film durchkloppt (SHELTER). 

Dass Horrorfilme auch witzig sein können beweist der erste Film der Produktionsfirma Nocturna (THEY WILL KILL YOU) .

Ente gut, alles gut lautet das Stück der Theatergruppe Zellerndorf. Wir konnten mit insgesamt 5 Beteiligten an dieser Produktion Interviews führen. 

Abgerundet wird die Sendung  mit Awardwinnern best Song der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Musik aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 25.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Lisa Seidl, LLM über digitale Plattformen schaffen Macht-Assymetrien und neue Abhängigkeiten.

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #schauspiel #acting #casting

items.text:
🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

items.text: Statister søges til optagelser i København.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STATISTER SOGES I forbindelse med optagelserne til en ny, dansk spillefilm soger Hyane Film statister (15+) af alle kon/typer, kon/ der har lyst til at spille passagerer en metro. Dato: Tirsdag. april Lokation: Kebenhavn Tidsrum: 11.15-13.45 Som tak for din medvirken vil du modtage en biografbillet, og vi vil selvfolgelig gore vores bedste for at skabe en god og spzendende oplevelse! Vil du vaere med? Send en mail til statist@hyaenefilm.dk, statist@hya og vedhaeft et vellignende foto + fulde navn, alder, telefonnummer og e-mail. Du bedes skrive folgende i emnefeltet: "METRO" Vi glaeder OS meget til at hore fra dig!'

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Student Film
Hi!! We are looking for two actors for a student film shot in Prague. The film is in English, and the crew is English speaking. 

General storyline: a couple is cooking for dinner, but they are missing the main ingredient. As they bicker back and forth, they discover their lack of trust in one another. 

Sarah — A female actress, 22-25, to play a caring and detailed-oriented young lady. 

Tom — A male actor,  22-25, to play a calm and sympathetic young man. 

Both should be comfortable with some physicality (kiss on the cheek, hug etc.). A fluent level of English is required. 

We are open to casting not only individuals but also a couple!

Shoot dates: April 15-19

As we are a no budget student film, we do not have the option to give compensation. However, food and beverages will be provided!!

If you’re interested and available, please send an email to barunka.vas@gmail.com or DM me with a picture and a short introduction of you (+ your past experience if applicable) 💗

MALE DANCERS NEEDED FOR FEATURE FILM IN LEXINGTON, KY!

Are you a dancer who can learn steps quickly? VIN MORREALE CASTING needs experienced Male Dancers - 18 years or older, all ethnicities - who can quickly learn a choreographed dance routine on March 30th and perform it on camera the following day.  These will be background roles in a fun scene in a movie with two name Hollywood stars starting next week. Rate is $100 per day for March 30th & 31st. 

SEEKING: 
MALE DANCERS - 18 and over, All Ethnicities. Able to learn steps rapidly. 

If you have serious dance experience and are available 3/30 & 3/31, email VIN@ACADEMYARTS.COM with the following:

NAME
AGE 
HEIGHT
PHONE
EMAIL
UNION or NON-UNION
AGENT - If you have one

And include a recent PHOTO and a selfie video link of you dancing, any style. AND/OR attach a resume with any dance experience/training listed. 

Put MALE DANCER in the subject line of your email and send to VIN@ACADEMYARTS.COM asap.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: LONDON ONTARIO

Hi everyone, I am a first-year film student at Fanshawe.  I am directing a thriller short film called “Redacted” .We are looking for three main roles: 

**Synopsis**

Dianna Sloan is one of the best; she solves cases faster than anyone. She falls asleep and wakes up the next morning with the answer. When Sergeant Ryder gives her one of the hardest cases regarding a Mob Boss, her dream is what helps her solve it. Dianna Sloan fights to change how the dream ends, so it will not become a reality. The catch is that she is the one who really needs to be caught, to truly solve the case.

**Dianna Sloan **(20s-30s) - Female

A lead badass FBI detective, she will take on any case and is confident she will make it out alive every time, after a supernatural experience the case is seen in a new light.

**Sergeant Ryder **(20s-30s) Male

The FBI sergeant cares about what Dianna gets herself into, but is always there to help her out. Sergeant Ryder is strict about getting the job done, but is still the world’s best boss.

**Mob Boss **(20s-30s) Male

 A powerful man who gets what he wants and is willing to put up a fight. He is the type of person you do not want to mess with.

These are UNPAID roles

We are aiming to shoot over the next two weeks 

If you are interested in one of these roles, you can reach me via Gmail at R3DACTEDFilm@gmail.com

✔️Female presenting

items.text:
INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL:

Genre: Existential horror

Title: Beyond Now 

Logline: A group of close-knit friends get together for one last hurrah. What awaits them are horrors that will change their lives in ways they could never prepare for.

Production company: Bench-Top Productions 

Contact info: beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com

IMPORTANT NOTE: These roles have hard shoot dates over April, May, and October. If submitting please confirm full availability for the dates listed for each specific role. The audition deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

ROLES:

Hailey, Lead female: Early to Mid 30’s

Mom of the group. Overly Responsible. Protective of her friends and family. Cautious about her partner Ethan’s Anxiety. Hailey organized this trip as a final ‘hurrah’ to announce her pregnancy.

Shoot dates: 4/9, 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/17, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 4/21, 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12, 5/16, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Brooke, Supporting female: Late 20’s - Early 30’s 

Wannabe Instagram influencer. Super jealous of her friend Megan and her “so-called career.” One of the class clowns of the group. She has a ‘Team Rocket Jesse and James’ dynamic with her best friend Chris from their years working together in a coffee shop. Strongly copes with humor. Hyperfixates on her special interests: photography, true crime and mystics.

Shoot dates: 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 5/7, 5/10, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Compensation: IMDB credit, meal and reel. 

Union status: Non-union

Shoot locations: Conifer, Golden and Denver CO

AUDITION INFORMATION: Auditions will be held via selftape. To receive sides and selftape instructions, please send a headshot, resume and reel to beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com with which role you're submitting for and a confirmation of availability for the dates listed for that role. The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

IMDB: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL** - Australian TV Pilot "Next Big Thing". 

TV SHOW | COLLINGWOOD AREA | PAID

**Casting:**

Mateo - Male 21-26 (Must be able to sing)

Charlie - Male 20-25

**Date TBC:**

Mid-May, 3-4 filming days

**Chemistry read / Rehearsal:** 

Seddon

Next Big Thing is about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. We follow a friend group of singers, actors and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne’s Creative to try and become the ‘Next Big Thing’

This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.

**If interested**, please email showreel and headshots to: level1203media@gmail.com

Please include your availability in Mid-May

You can also apply through Starnow using this link:

https://www.starnow.com/casting/pilot-project-next-big-thing-aussie-young-adult-tv-show-3126587/

Actors may also be asked to do an in-person audition and/or chemistry read. Shooting will be in the Collingwood area (TBC), in early May, 2026. This is a PAID project!'

items.text:
Stimme • Herz • Show – Pur und Authentisch! 🎤✨

Wer mich kennt, weiß: Bei mir gibt es keine Maskerade und keine Drag-Show.

Ich stehe für 100% echtes Entertainment.

Das Besondere? Eine feminine Performance trifft auf meine natürliche, sonore Männerstimme. Ein Kontrast, der unter die Haut geht und bekannten Klassikern eine ganz neue Seele verleiht. 🎶

Egal ob:

✅ Kult & Legenden (Tribute Shows)
✅ Party & Energie (Schlager-Remixe & Pop)
✅ Gefühl & Tiefgang (Chansons & Liedermacher)

Ich bin weltweit für euch unterwegs – zu Lande, zu Wasser und überall dort, wo gute Musik und echte Emotionen gebraucht werden. 🌍🚢

Lust auf ein maßgeschneidertes Live-Erlebnis?

Schaut euch die Details im Flyer an oder schreibt mir direkt eine DM! 📩

#MathiasMarieKaiser #LiveGesang #eventhighlight #KreuzfahrtShow #transartist

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text: Nehmt gern Kontakt zu Sanny4me aka Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation auf! ❤️

Natural chemistry, strong presence and a great balance of professionalism and personality.

Experienced across lifestyle, commercial and family shoots — from polished and aspirational to relaxed and authentic.

Comfortable on camera, take direction well, and bring great energy to every set.

Feel free to reach out for profiles, reels or more info.

Steve

items.text:
STOP venligst med at koge kartofler i vand! Da min bedstemor hørte, at jeg koger kartofler i vand for at lave kartoffelmos, grinede hun bogstaveligt talt af mig. Hun delte den hemmelige ingrediens til at lave den bedste kartoffelmos nogensinde. Brug denne ingrediens i stedet – jeg lægger opskriften nedenunder. .
Jeg må udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak. Fuld opskrift
items.title: Afsløring af hemmeligheden: Hvorfor du ikke bør koge kartoffelmos, og den bedste metode til at lave dem – Serpin Recipes

items.text:
Auditions for Home I'm Darling at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente!
AUDITIONS!!!

Home I’m Darling
By Laura Wade
Directed by Hillary Pearson

Auditions: Sunday March 29th 6pm-10pm and Monday March 30th 6pm-10pm (choose one date)
Callbacks: (if necessary) by invitation Tuesday, March 31st 6pm-10pm
Performances May 22nd -June 14th , Thursdays through Sundays

For auditions, cold reading sides will be available. Please bring a headshot and
resume and be prepared to list any conflicts.
Rehearsals will be held at Cabrillo Playhouse, Mondays through Thursdays 7pm-10pm with some Saturdays. Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.

Synopsis: Home, I’m Darling by Laura Wade is a clever and thought-provoking comedy that explores what happens when nostalgia becomes a way of life. Judy has stepped away from the modern world to embrace the role of the perfect 1950s housewife. However, perfection often comes at a price. Behind the smiles and immaculate surfaces, tensions begin to simmer. Home, I’m Darling is a sharp, stylish comedy with a layered take on nostalgia, feminism, and the complexities of relationships. It explores how we construct and cling to our own versions of reality, and what happens when those carefully built narratives start to unravel.

All Characters use a British accent. Region is flexible by character.
There is a small stipend offered.
We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

Character Breakdown can be found at [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎Thrilling and entertaining audiences since 1953 Cabrillo Playhouse نبسسالمر MIR Home, r Darling by Laura Wade May 22 to June 14, 2026 www.cabrilloplayhouse.org‎'‎

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON/UXBRIDGE)**

Hi everyone!
I’m casting for a **Brunel University student short film** titled *Echoes of Time* — a warm, emotional drama about a university student reconnecting with childhood memories during a difficult time.

📍 **Location:** Uxbridge, London
📅 **Shoot dates:** 20, 22, 24 April
💸 **Unpaid (student production) – travel expenses covered**

✨ Great opportunity for actors looking to collaborate on a meaningful, visually driven student project.

If you have any questions, feel free to message me!

Casting Call!!! 

Currently casting for a new TV show. Below are the requirements, if you know anyone who fits the bill, please get in touch ASAP!!!

✅ 18 - 24 year old white males
✅ Ideally from London
✅ Authentic London Accent 
✅ Ideally a free agent 
✅ Experience a bonus but not essential 
✅ Available to shoot from end of May

It is paid! Happy to explain more deets over a call!

topComments.text: Really you should provide full details up front, to save people wasting their time…including you. It’s very easy to update your post with all the details. All professional castings provide full disclosure. No one should have to find out secretly what the deal is.

items.text:
**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY - KRAKÓW**

Do realizacji zaliczeniowej etiudy filmowej poszukujemy aktorów. Zdjęcia w dniach: 10,11,12 kwietnia.

Realizacja non profit. 

Opis etiudy: ,,Janusz starszy taksówkarz, siedząc na kacu, napotyka na swojej drodze tajemnicza kobietę, która z czasem okazuje się samym diabłem, czy dla kieliszka wódki odda własną duszę?"

Postaci:

Janusz (~50 lat) - Zmęczony życiem, skacowany, bezsilny wobec współczesnego świata, prosty facet z niewyparzoną gębą zapatrzony w dawno minione czasy. 

Diablica (~30 lat) - Nie człowiek, nienaganne maniery połączone z niezwykłą złośliwością, uroda ukrywająca niecne zamiary, rozbawiona sytuacją, rozdaje wszystkie karty.

Chłopak (~20 lat) - Bezczelny, utytułowany, bardzo chce się wybić, uważa że nagrywanie daje mu immunitet, brak empatii, performatywna pewność siebie skrywająca nieśmiałość.

Zainteresowanych proszę o podesłanie w wiadomości prywatnej: demo, wizytówki i zdjęcia.

**SUSZEC woj. śląskie**

**11 kwietnia, sobota**

**film fabularny**

Do filmu fabularnego, lata 70te, szukam Statystów - **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-40 lat w charakterze PILOTÓW.**

**Stawka: 140 zł /dzień zdjęciowy lub 280 zł **dla panów, którzy zostaną wybrani do epizodu niemego. Płatne gotówką po planie.

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **SUSZEC **

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: **tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
Remembering Nikolay Kolyada — The Sun of Russian Drama 🎭

What does it take to keep a theatre alive—not for a season, but for over 20 years?

In this lecture, I speak about my time in Yekaterinburg, watching my first Russian play, and then unexpectedly sitting down with Nikolay Kolyada.

There’s a section in the video where I include part of that interview. In it, Kolyada speaks about how his theatre actually runs — the actors, the performances, the reality of sustaining it without state funding.

Our conversation went on for much longer. We spoke about directing, the audience, how actors work, and the difference between Western theatre and Russian theatre — whether you start from the head, or from the heart.

What stayed with me is how everything in that theatre is driven by necessity.
They have to keep working. Keep performing. Keep the theatre alive.

That’s what this lecture is really about — not just who he was, but how that kind of work is built, and sustained over time.

Watch the full lecture here:
https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE?si=BiAU5qoWsboXEGZR

sharedPost.text:
Remembering one of contemporary Russian theatre’s most prolific—and relentless—figures, Nikolay Kolyada 🎭

Often called “The Sun of Russian Drama,” Kolyada was a playwright, director, teacher, and founder of his own independent theatre—built not on state support, but on sheer necessity, discipline, and an unbreakable commitment to the work. He wrote over 150 plays, trained a generation of playwrights, and created a living, breathing theatre that performed up to 70 times a month.

His philosophy was simple, but unforgiving: captivate the artist, and pay them. Keep the work moving. Keep the theatre alive.

He didn’t just make theatre—he built a system where theatre could survive.

Wishing you a moment today to remember the artists who dedicate their lives entirely to the craft.

#kolyada #russiantheatre #acting #vlytartacting

items.text:
Hi Everyone.

 

First time posting.

 

CASTING CALL – WILMINGTON, NC

 

We're holding auditions for a NON-UNION, Proof of Concept, short film. Two in One, working title.

 

Looking to cast a WOMAN of any ethnicity, who can pass for 30 to 35 years of age.

 

WHEN AND WHERE:

Auditions will be held on April 12th, between 1 and 4 PM, at Unity Spiritual Center of Wilmington, 717 Orchard Avenue, Wilmington, NC 28403.

The shoot is scheduled for Saturday, April 18th with an alternate shoot date of Sunday, April 19th; time of shoot TBD.

 

CHARACTER DESCRIPTION:

We are looking for a type. But, if you don’t check all the boxes and you still think you might be a good fit, we encourage you to audition.

 

“MAX, is a mature, attractive and sensual woman; on a mission. Wearing a short, black-laced slip, she searches her closet for something to wear to her firm’s annual party…”

 

MAX has curves; she’s not an athlete but she is toned. She’s able to play and sell: nice girl next door / farmer's daughter; CEO executive / tough MMA fighter, and pull off a hot, sexy tight black mini skirt, in high heels.

 

There is NO NUDITY, but you need to be comfortable with wearing a black, possibly laced, short slip for most of the shoot. Underwear is okay as long as it can blend well with the slip.

 

There is no pay, but a $15 gas allowance, food, and reel will be provided.

 

WHAT’S NEXT:

If interested, please contact me at Stage13Auditions@gmail.com; send a link to a short scene (45 – 60 sec. will do). It’s okay if this is your first audition, and you don’t have any work to show; we've all been there… at some point. Bring a full-body photo of yourself, if you don’t have one, have a friend take one for you.

 

Good Luck; but more importantly, have fun.

 

We look forward to meeting with you.

items.text:
VRASP is expanding and we have a class for you.

Whether you are in London or Hampshire, VRASP is bringing professional screen acting training to your city and we want you in the room.

We are not a drama club. We are a screen acting school run by working industry professionals, and every class is designed to give you real, practical skills for film and TV. From your very first session you will be learning the same techniques used on professional sets, getting honest feedback, and building the kind of presence that gets you noticed on camera.

We currently have classes running in two locations:

London - Brixton

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.

items.text:
OPEN CASTING CALL (casting for supporting roles)

Please send any submissions to: theanswershortfilm26@gmail.com

Logline:
A respected working actor appears to have everything, career momentum, a loving family, and control over his life, until subtle cracks reveal he may be performing the very reality he refuses to confront.

Location: Los Angeles 

Submission Deadline: April 1st 

Shoot Date: April 18th

Non Paid/Non Union

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'The Answer Short Film Casting Call : Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity On set Costumer. Grounded, observant, quietly attentive. MEGAN: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity On set Makeup Artist. Warm, friendly, intuitive. SARAH: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Actress. Present, responsive, grounded. RACHEL: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Relaxed, Social, easygoing. NICOLE: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Quiet, observant, friend of Rachel 1ST AD: OPEN GENDER, 30s, Open Ethnicity Authoritative, effiecent, composed. Email headshots & reel to TheAnswerShortfilm26@gmail.com Decline Decline Acceb'

items.text:
DONNA GROSSMAN CASTING  -NOW CASTING — ACTOR MOMS WITH THEIR OWN 6 - 8 MONTH OLD BABY

Non‑Union • Goat Milk for Babies

We’re casting a real mother, who is an actor, and her baby for a warm, authentic, user-generated style video campaign.

Production is looking for a genuine, playful mother-baby connection, and the natural rhythm that only comes from a real parent and child.

MOM
25–35 years old

Dark hair / US Latina or mixed‑race look preferred, but open to all

Strong with conversational copy (NO ACCENTS)

Warm, natural, responsive to baby, comfortable ad‑libbing

BABY
6–8 months old

Expressive, curious, babbly, sweet

Not too much hair (still very baby‑like)

RATES + USAGE
Mom Session: $750 + 20%

Baby Session: $500 + 20%

Mom Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $7,000 + 20%

Baby Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $3,000 + 20%

Usage: 1‑year worldwide digital/social (no broadcast)

ONE SHOOT DAY:
Week of April 6 or April 13

To submit, please email Dgcasting@donnagrossmancasting.com with your name, your baby’s age, and recent photos.

* Special Note: Baby will not need to drink goat milk.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of baby
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear
May be an image of baby and smiling
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear

items.text:
We are an Independent production company looking to establish ourselves with our filmmaking debut & we are looking for our leading lady to join our team!

         The character has a business mindset with greedy intentions that has a unique fashion sense. It's important to us that you're comfortable with our wardrobe requests...Our vision for the character is she wears a variety of outfits in a leather jacket & cozy sweaters with leather pants, & long boots preferably flat not heel.

Short film (Around 40 min.)
Film will be entered in film festivals. 
Pay: $1,000 + IMDb credit 
*If you're interested, send a headshot,  link to your IMDb page (if you have one), & link to your Instagram to this email: deowainstaproductions@gmail.com 

We will send a follow-up email with a short slide (scene) for you to make an audition tape for us. 

We will appreciate it if you go support our Instagram & YouTube channel! Upon doing so we will keep you in mind for opportunities in our future film projects!

https://www.instagram.com/deowainsta_productions?igsh=MTNoM3JzaGl2bjZ6OQ==

https://youtube.com/@deowainstaproductions?si=sJs83boxoJO_7oTA

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Female lead, age 21-35 Native American, Latina, or Asian 4 days of filming in upstate N.Y. (Adirondack region) lodging & meals/ catering will be provided *You are responsible for travel expenses if coming from out of state You will be paid a flat rate Must be comfortable doing scenes outdoors in the cold & walking along a snow covered trail in a forest setting. The film is a psychological thriller based on Native American folklore'

items.text:
CASTING IS OPEN FOR OUR DEBUT FEATURE FILM PAID POSITION

Filming is taking place in June and will be shot in the Woking Surrey area

we are looking for a male child actor playing age between 5-10 To portray the character of Elijah, who is non-verbal and autistic, a variety of skills and qualities are necessary:

1. Research and Understanding: It's essential to have an understanding of autism, particularly non-verbal autism. This includes recognizing the diversity of experiences and behaviors within the autism spectrum. The role requires an empathetic approach to connect authentically with Elijah's experiences and emotions while being sensitive to the nuances of his communication style.

2. We require legal guardian/ parents to be present during auditions

3. we will be working with the local authorities and adhering to the strict rules enforced by local authorities via Child Performance Licences, which mandate maximum time on set, limits on on-camera time, and specific breaks for meals and rest etc�

please apply by sending your details and spotlight to our email address at tideswellproduction@gmail.com

thank you for reading and hope you are all have a fantastic rest of the week
